description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a robust, rectangular steel head with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking surface on both ends. The head is a dark gray metallic color, showing a solid, dense construction suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle is long, straight, and made of wood, with a natural brown finish and a cylindrical shape that tapers slightly towards the end for a secure grip. The junction between the head and handle appears tightly fitted, ensuring stability during use. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on either the head or handle. The hammer appears well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage.
description: A heavy sledgehammer with a solid gray steel head and a long, straight wooden handle. The tool is sturdy and unadorned, designed for powerful impact tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular steel head and the straight wooden handle beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, again showing the broad face of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the slim edge of the head and the handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle with a smooth, cylindrical shape and a natural finish
attribute_head_type: sledgehammer head, rectangular and solid, with flat striking faces on both ends and slightly beveled edges
